commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Is fire-tried; that is, most pure, like gold purified by fire. (Challoner) (Psalm xvii. 31., and Jeremias xxiii. 29.)
It cannot deceive.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: Is fire tried: That is, most pure, like gold purified by fire.
